case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION, VS. CAROLINE DE MESA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION, A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE MESA, CAROLINE , AN INDIVIDUAL $9,551.23 PRINCIPAL, $1,870.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,041.34 INTEREST, $455.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,917.57, SEE SCANNED DOC
